'''Naia''' was a [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned [[Medic/Legends|medic]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]].<ref name="CSWE" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] she was part of a resistance movement against the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].
